content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 WARN — SettingsView.swift:12 shows user-facing label "Experimental: may be unstable and lose sort order" for the AI Sort toggle.
Pierre: Apple reviewers may read "Experimental" as an admission the feature is unfinished, which can trigger 2.2 questions about shipping incomplete functionality. The description and release notes are clean, but this in-app string is user-visible, not a code comment. Consider rewording to something like "May affect sort order" without implying the build is a beta/test feature.
